name: PHOENIX MOTOR INC.
summary: Overview Phoenix Motor Inc., doing business as Phoenix Motorcars through its wholly owned subsidiaries, Phoenix Cars LLC, Phoenix Motorcars Leasing LLC, and EdisonFuture Motor, Inc., is a leading electrification solutions provider for the commercial vehicle industry as well as other industries. Phoenix designs, develops, manufactures, assembles, and integrates electric drive systems and light and medium duty electric vehicles (EVs), with an aim to reduce carbon intensity and greenhouse gas (GHG)...
